body:
## Problem

Running `comm -23` between soundLikeGuides.js slugs and albumArticles.js slugs reveals **7 slug mismatches** causing live 404s from already-shipped SoundLike guide pages. Every guide page that links to one of these slugs sends users to a dead URL.

## Root cause

soundLikeGuides.js references article slugs that were named differently when they were created:

| soundLikeGuides.js slug (broken) | Actual slug in albumArticles.js | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `among-the-living-drum-setup` | `charlie-benante-among-the-living-drum-setup` | Update slug in soundLikeGuides.js |
| `annihilation-of-the-wicked-drum-setup` | `george-kollias-nile-annihilation-drum-setup` | Update slug in soundLikeGuides.js |
| `death-human-drum-setup` | `human-drum-setup` | Update slug in soundLikeGuides.js |
| `whats-in-george-kolliass-kit` (typo: double-s) | `whats-in-george-kollias-kit` | Fix typo in soundLikeGuides.js |
| `whats-in-jay-weinbergs-kit` | `jay-weinberg-complete-drum-setup` | Update slug in soundLikeGuides.js |
| `whats-in-matt-greiners-kit` | `matt-greiner-complete-drum-setup` | Update slug in soundLikeGuides.js |
| `whats-in-travis-orbins-kit` | `travis-orbin-drum-setup` | Update slug in soundLikeGuides.js |

## File to change

`packages/frontend/data/soundLikeGuides.js`

This is a pure data fix — no new articles needed, no UI changes. Each broken slug gets replaced with the correct existing slug.

## Impact

- 7 live soundLike guide pages currently have broken related-article links
- Affected guides include: Charlie Benante, George Kollias, Sean Reinert, Jay Weinberg, Matt Greiner, Travis Orbin
- Fixing these removes 404 errors, improves crawl signal, and keeps users on-site after clicking "explore more" links in guides

## Verify
1. Run `grep -E 'among-the-living-drum-setup|annihilation-of-the-wicked|death-human-drum-setup|george-kolliass|whats-in-jay-weinbergs|whats-in-matt-greiners|whats-in-travis-orbins' packages/frontend/data/soundLikeGuides.js` → should return 0 results
2. All 7 slug references in soundLikeGuides.js now point to slugs that exist in albumArticles.js
3. No new files created — purely a data correction
4. Visit live soundLike guide pages for Charlie Benante, George Kollias, Sean Reinert → no broken links

## Done
All 7 broken slugs corrected in soundLikeGuides.js; no broken related-article links from any SoundLike guide page.
title: SEO: Fix soundLikeGuides.js broken slug refs — 7 live 404s from guide pages
resolution: All 7 broken slug refs in packages/frontend/data/soundLikeGuides.js were corrected: (1) among-the-living-drum-setup → charlie-benante-among-the-living-drum-setup, (2) annihilation-of-the-wicked-drum-setup → george-kollias-nile-annihilation-drum-setup, (3) death-human-drum-setup → human-drum-setup, (4) whats-in-george-kolliass-kit → whats-in-george-kollias-kit (typo fix), (5) whats-in-jay-weinbergs-kit → jay-weinberg-complete-drum-setup, (6) whats-in-matt-greiners-kit → matt-greiner-complete-drum-setup, (7) whats-in-travis-orbins-kit → travis-orbin-drum-setup. Pure data fix — no new files created. Grep for all broken patterns returns zero matches for the broken slugs. Committed in 28d1563.
